description: This is a React component file defining the main app page for a note-taking frontend interface using Next.js. It manages state, fetches data via API calls, handles user interactions, theme toggling, and renders the layout with components such as Sidebar, TopBar, NoteList, NoteEditor, and SettingsModal.

methods.name: refreshTags
methods.description: Fetches and updates the list of tags from the API.

methods.name: refreshNotes
methods.description: Fetches and updates the list of notes based on current filters and query.

methods.name: scheduleAutosave
methods.description: Sets a timer to automatically save note changes after a debounce delay.

methods.name: onNewNote
methods.description: Creates a new note with default title and adds it to the state.

methods.name: onDelete
methods.description: Deletes a note by ID and updates the local notes list.

methods.name: onTogglePinned
methods.description: Toggles the pinned status of a note.

methods.name: onDeleteTag
methods.description: Deletes a tag and refreshes tags and notes.
